regime.label: Risk-On / Bullish
regime.summary: Equity markets remain in uptrend post-tariff relief rally. SPY at $733.73 (-0.67% May 19), QQQ at $701.53. Pullback from highs but structure intact above 20d/50d MAs. VIX at $17.95 — below 20, fear gauge declining from March peak of $31.05. TLT at $82.98 — bonds under pressure as 10Y yields remain elevated. GLD at $413.56 — gold consolidating at highs. WTI at ~$104/bbl — crude elevated on supply constraints. Regime: Risk-On with moderate caution on elevated rates and tariff residual uncertainty.

key_signals.label: S&P 500 ETF
key_signals.note: Above both MAs; mild pullback from highs after Moody's downgrade noise; uptrend intact

key_signals.label: Nasdaq 100 ETF
key_signals.note: AI earnings cycle (NVDA beat) supporting tech; above both MAs

key_signals.label: CBOE Volatility Index
key_signals.note: Below 20 threshold; declining from March 2026 peak of 31.05; confirms risk-on regime

key_signals.label: iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF
key_signals.note: Below both MAs; 10Y yields elevated ~4.5%+; headwind for rate-sensitive sectors (utilities, REITs)

key_signals.label: SPDR Gold Shares ETF
key_signals.note: Gold at highs; geopolitical premium + inflation hedge; confirms macro uncertainty bid

key_signals.label: WTI Crude Oil (USD/bbl)
key_signals.note: Crude above $100; supply constraints supporting energy sector. Invalidates energy bear thesis.

macro_backdrop.fed_stance: hold — no near-term rate cuts expected
macro_backdrop.earnings_season: Q1 2026 beats broadly confirmed; NVDA catalyst active

invalidation_conditions: VIX sustained above 25 (regime shift to risk-off)
